evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long had 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, 12 minute hold, and -11.7 worst MAE. It is too small to promote but materially cleaner than the current tail-heavy 1DTE and charm-pin profiles.
name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Expansion
risk: Single-trade evidence may be luck; loosening flow gates could add noisy continuation entries or displace better pullback/squeeze trades.
trigger: VALID_0DTE state with accepted call-wall/strike context, positive forward DEX, and call-volume expansion that is present but below the prior stricter threshold.
validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE below -60, no worsening of total worst MAE, total net profit >= 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.
